title: Knip And E18E JavaScript Tooling Metadata
citation: Knip documentation, Socket.dev E18E initiative summary, and npm package metadata queried on 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Developer-tooling hygiene planning for unused files, unused dependencies, unused exports, and ecosystem modernization review.
claims_supported: Knip supports JavaScript/TypeScript unused file, dependency, and export analysis, including monorepo-oriented configuration and ignore lists.
As queried on 2026-05-03, knip 6.11.0 is ISC licensed.
As queried on 2026-05-03, @e18e/cli 0.5.0 and @e18e/eslint-plugin 0.4.1 are MIT licensed.
The E18E initiative focuses on ecosystem performance by reducing dependency-tree cost and documenting lighter alternatives.
claims_not_supported: That Knip or E18E can become blocking CI gates without project-specific baselines and false-positive review.
That E18E whole-repo analysis is currently fast enough for the OpenClinXR verify gate.
